# Memes de Julio

> A fun Spanish-language website that shows a new meme every day during July. The rest of the year, it displays a countdown to the next July 1st.

## About

- The site is in Argentine Spanish (es-AR)
- During July (days 1-31), visitors see a randomly selected meme for that day
- Outside July, visitors see a countdown showing days remaining until July 1st
- After July ends (August-December), a "see you next year" message is shown
- Each meme can be shared via a direct link using the `?id=` query parameter

## Content

- [Home](https://memesdejulio.com.ar/): Main page with daily meme or countdown
- [Meme Catalog](https://memesdejulio.com.ar/memes.json): JSON catalog of all 31 days of memes with alt text

## Contact

- Email: memes@memesdejulio.com.ar
